entity.summary: Non-custodial decentralized exchange and application-specific chain offering perpetual-futures trading with USDe-based collateral and an expanding spot and DeFi product stack.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation describes Ethereal as a non-custodial perpetuals DEX and EVM application chain with USDe collateral, sequencer-based order matching, onchain settlement, and planned spot and broader DeFi products. Current independently maintained metrics report non-zero perpetual volume, TVL, fees, revenue, and open interest. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Ethereal official documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Ethereal as a non-custodial perpetuals DEX and EVM appchain using USDe collateral, high-throughput order matching, and onchain security and settlement.

evidence.title: Ethereal DEX protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day perpetual volume together with TVL, fees, revenue, and open interest, supporting active classification.
